word: H238 - אָזַן - ʼâzan - aw-zan' - Give ear

sections.paragraph:
Original: אזן

Transliteration: 'âzan

Phonetic: aw-zan'

BDB Definition:

  1. to hear, listen
    1. (Hiphil)
      1. to hear, listen, give ear
      2. to be obedient, harken
      3. to hear or listen to prayers (of God)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 57

Part(s) of speech: Verb
